visa_types.name: Visiting Family/Friends
visa_types.documents_required:
- Document Checklist – Click here (https://images.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/2evr34PHcg8FWM19FKDd2R/7c0b4d5e36d7543dd3e22855cfca5bcb/List-of-supporting-documents-Dec-25.pdf)
- Travel insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries.
- The Embassy/Consulate reserves the right to decide what type of document will be required for the verification of the purpose of stay. An invitation authenticated by the Alien Police may be requested from visa applicants of any nationality. Copy of Slovak ID (or residence permit in Slovakia) of the inviting friend/relative must also be submitted.
visa_types.visa_fees:
[svk > twn > en > Table: Visiting Family/Friends > Visa fees]
The above-mentioned Visa Fee is to be paid NT Dollar in Cash.
VFS Service charge:
Applicants applying at the Visa Application Centre shall be levied a service charge of 40 Euros (Inclusive of Tax) payable in cash.
Please Note: 
- The child between 0 - 12 years on the date of submission at VFS are Biometric exempt.
- The applicable visa fee in NT dollar is as per the current exchange rate. The same is subject to change without notice.
- The Visa fee and service charges are non-refundable in case the visa is refused.
visa_types.processing_time: From the date of receipt of application at the Embassy of Slovakia, it takes 15 working days to process the visa application. The duration of days when the application is in transit between the Visa Application Centre and the Embassy are not counted.
visa_types.overview:
Overview
Visit to family or friend visa application is applicable in case you are travelling for visiting your family member or friend.
General Public are hereby informed that family members of EU citizen are kindly requested to contact the Slovak Economic and Cultural Office in Taipei pertaining to submission of their documents for visa.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
Visit to family or friend visa application is applicable in case you are travelling for visiting your family member or friend.
General Public are hereby informed that family members of EU citizen are kindly requested to contact the Slovak Economic and Cultural Office in Taipei pertaining to submission of their documents for visa.

## Visa Fees

[svk > twn > en > Table: Visiting Family/Friends > Visa fees]
The above-mentioned Visa Fee is to be paid NT Dollar in Cash.
VFS Service charge:
Applicants applying at the Visa Application Centre shall be levied a service charge of 40 Euros (Inclusive of Tax) payable in cash.
Please Note: 
- The child between 0 - 12 years on the date of submission at VFS are Biometric exempt.
- The applicable visa fee in NT dollar is as per the current exchange rate. The same is subject to change without notice.
- The Visa fee and service charges are non-refundable in case the visa is refused.

## Documents Required
- Document Checklist – Click here (https://images.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/2evr34PHcg8FWM19FKDd2R/7c0b4d5e36d7543dd3e22855cfca5bcb/List-of-supporting-documents-Dec-25.pdf)
- Travel insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries.
- The Embassy/Consulate reserves the right to decide what type of document will be required for the verification of the purpose of stay. An invitation authenticated by the Alien Police may be requested from visa applicants of any nationality. Copy of Slovak ID (or residence permit in Slovakia) of the inviting friend/relative must also be submitted.

## Photo Specifications
Please provide one recent colour photograph (not more than 6 months old) of yourself, meeting the following requirements:
- Taken against a light (white or off-white) background so that features are distinguishable and contrast against the background.
- Clear quality and with the face in focus
- Full face: non-smiling, no sunglasses, no hat/cap or any head covering, unless the applicant wears such items because of his/her religious belief or ethnic background
- Printed on normal photographic paper (camera print)
- Please stick the photograph on the Visa Application Form
If the photographs presented do not meet these requirements (click here (https://images.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/6CatJKC0My579N64JxO9kf/8367181d859635d05f32e30d40be5885/PhotoSpecifications.pdf)), then the visa application will be considered incomplete and applicant will be asked to take new photographs in the photo booth in the visa application centre.

## Processing Time
From the date of receipt of application at the Embassy of Slovakia, it takes 15 working days to process the visa application. The duration of days when the application is in transit between the Visa Application Centre and the Embassy are not counted.

## Download Forms
Application for Visa (https://images.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/2xwogscOyiNCgepGfT07iD/9e06005fe62c831f252354f0663c6ffa/Schengen-visa-Application-Dec-25.pdf)

visa_types.overview:
Overview
This category of visa caters to people wishing to visit Slovakia for purposes of International Conferences, Seminars, Workshop, Cultural and Sport Events . Applicants will have to provide evidence that he/she falls under this category.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
This category of visa caters to people wishing to visit Slovakia for purposes of International Conferences, Seminars, Workshop, Cultural and Sport Events . Applicants will have to provide evidence that he/she falls under this category.

## Visa Fees

[svk > twn > en > Table: International Conferences, Seminars, Workshop, Cultural and Sport Events > Visa fees]
The above-mentioned Visa Fee is to be paid NT Dollars in Cash.
VFS Service charge:
Applicants applying at the Visa Application Centre shall be levied a service charge of 40 Euros (Inclusive of Tax) payable in cash.
Please Note: 
- The child between 0 - 12 years on the date of submission at VFS are Biometric exempt.
- The applicable visa fee in NT dollar is as per the current exchange rate. The same is subject to change without notice.
- The Visa fee and service charges are non-refundable in case the visa is refused.

## Documents Required
- Document Checklist – Click here (https://images.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/2evr34PHcg8FWM19FKDd2R/7c0b4d5e36d7543dd3e22855cfca5bcb/List-of-supporting-documents-Dec-25.pdf)
- Travel insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries.

## Photo Specifications
Please provide one recent colour photograph (not more than 6 months old) of yourself, meeting the following requirements:
- Taken against a light (white or off-white) background so that features are distinguishable and contrast against the background.
- Clear quality and with the face in focus
- Full face: non-smiling, no sunglasses, no hat/cap or any head covering, unless the applicant wears such items because of his/her religious belief or ethnic background
- Printed on normal photographic paper (camera print)
- Please stick the photograph on the Visa Application Form
If the photographs presented do not meet these requirements (click here (https://images.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/6CatJKC0My579N64JxO9kf/8367181d859635d05f32e30d40be5885/PhotoSpecifications.pdf)), then the visa application will be considered incomplete and applicant will be asked to take new photographs in the photo booth in the visa application centre.

## Processing Time
From the date of receipt of application at the Embassy of Slovakia, it takes 15 working days to process the visa application. in exceptional cases the decision may take up to 60 days. The duration of days when the application is in transit between the Visa Application Centre and the Embassy are not counted.

## Download Forms
Application for Visa (https://images.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/2xwogscOyiNCgepGfT07iD/9e06005fe62c831f252354f0663c6ffa/Schengen-visa-Application-Dec-25.pdf)

## Overview

Applicants applying at the Visa Application Centre shall be levied a service charge of 40 Euros (Inclusive of Tax) payable in cash in NT dollars.
Please Note:

- The applicable visa fee in NT dollars is as per the current exchange rate. The same is subject to change without notice.
- The Visa fee and service charges are non-refundable in case the visa is refused.

## Documents Required

- Travel insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries.

## Photo Specifications
Please provide one recent colour photograph (not more than 6 months old) of yourself, meeting the following requirements:
- Taken against a light (white or off-white) background so that features are distinguishable and contrast against the background.
- Clear quality and with the face in focus
- Full face: non-smiling, no sunglasses, no hat/cap or any head covering, unless the applicant wears such items because of his/her religious belief or ethnic background
- Printed on normal photographic paper (camera print)
- Please stick the photograph on the Visa Application Form
If the photographs presented do not meet these requirements (click here (https://images.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/6CatJKC0My579N64JxO9kf/8367181d859635d05f32e30d40be5885/PhotoSpecifications.pdf)), then the visa application will be considered incomplete and applicant will be asked to take new photographs in the photo booth in the visa application centre.

visa_types.overview:
Overview
For guidelines on how to apply for a national visa for employment purposes, Please refer to Document Required page.
Only D visa (Employment) approved applicants can submit visa applications at our center.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
For guidelines on how to apply for a national visa for employment purposes, Please refer to Document Required page.
Only D visa (Employment) approved applicants can submit visa applications at our center.

## Visa Fees

[svk > twn > en > Table: National Visa – Employment and study > Visa fees]
The above-mentioned Visa Fee is to be paid NT Dollars in Cash.
VFS Service charge:
Applicants applying at the Visa Application Centre shall be levied a service charge of 40 Euros (Inclusive of Tax) payable in cash.
Please Note: 
- The applicable visa fee in NT dollars is as per the current exchange rate. The same is subject to change without notice.
- The Visa fee and service charges are non-refundable in case the visa is refused.

## Documents Required
- Application Form – Click here (https://images.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/4K326ZERRaOHoUrj7I2ben/8e9d38bf2c1faf19e8068eb00a4f95cb/D-visa-application-form-Dec-25.pdf)
- Dvisa Employment check list
- Sample of Application Form

## Photo Specifications
Please provide one recent colour photograph (not more than 6 months old) of yourself, meeting the following requirements:
- Taken against a light (white or off-white) background so that features are distinguishable and contrast against the background.
- Clear quality and with the face in focus
- Full face: non-smiling, no sunglasses, no hat/cap or any head covering, unless the applicant wears such items because of his/her religious belief or ethnic background
- Printed on normal photographic paper (camera print)
- Please stick the photograph on the Visa Application Form
If the photographs presented do not meet these requirements (click here (https://images.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/6CatJKC0My579N64JxO9kf/8367181d859635d05f32e30d40be5885/PhotoSpecifications.pdf)), then the visa application will be considered incomplete and applicant will be asked to take new photographs in the photo booth in the visa application centre.

## Processing Time
From the date of receipt of application at the Embassy of Slovakia, it takes 30 working days to process the visa application. The duration of days when the application is in transit between the Visa Application Centre and the Embassy are not counted.

## Download Forms
Application for Visa (https://images.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/4K326ZERRaOHoUrj7I2ben/8e9d38bf2c1faf19e8068eb00a4f95cb/D-visa-application-form-Dec-25.pdf)

visa_types.overview:
Overview
Business visa application is applicable in case you are travelling for business purposes. This visa is given for travel period of less than 90 days. This visa will be issued for business purpose only; for gainful professional activities (even if the work is not financially rewarded) you have to apply for a work permit.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
Business visa application is applicable in case you are travelling for business purposes. This visa is given for travel period of less than 90 days. This visa will be issued for business purpose only; for gainful professional activities (even if the work is not financially rewarded) you have to apply for a work permit.

## Visa Fees

[svk > twn > en > Table: Business Journeys > Visa fees]
The above-mentioned Visa Fee is to be paid NT Dollars in Cash.
VFS Service charge:
Applicants applying at the Visa Application Centre shall be levied a service charge of 40 Euros (Inclusive of Tax) payable in cash.
Please Note: 
- The child between 0 - 12 years on the date of submission at VFS are Biometric exempt.
- The applicable visa fee in NT dollars is as per the current exchange rate. The same is subject to change without notice.
- The Visa fee and service charges are non-refundable in case the visa is refused.

## Documents Required
- Document Checklist – Click here (https://images.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/2evr34PHcg8FWM19FKDd2R/7c0b4d5e36d7543dd3e22855cfca5bcb/List-of-supporting-documents-Dec-25.pdf)
- Travel insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries.

## Photo Specifications
Please provide one recent colour photograph (not more than 6 months old) of yourself, meeting the following requirements:
- Taken against a light (white or off-white) background so that features are distinguishable and contrast against the background.
- Clear quality and with the face in focus
- Full face: non-smiling, no sunglasses, no hat/cap or any head covering, unless the applicant wears such items because of his/her religious belief or ethnic background
- Printed on normal photographic paper (camera print)
- Please stick the photograph on the Visa Application Form
If the photographs presented do not meet these requirements (click here (https://images.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/6CatJKC0My579N64JxO9kf/8367181d859635d05f32e30d40be5885/PhotoSpecifications.pdf)), then the visa application will be considered incomplete and applicant will be asked to take new photographs in the photo booth in the visa application centre.

## Processing Time
From the date of receipt of application at the Embassy of Slovakia, it takes 15 working days to process the visa application. in exceptional cases the decision may take up to 60 days. The duration of days when the application is in transit between the Visa Application Centre and the Embassy are not counted.

## Download Forms
Application for Visa (https://images.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/2xwogscOyiNCgepGfT07iD/9e06005fe62c831f252354f0663c6ffa/Schengen-visa-Application-Dec-25.pdf)

visa_types.overview:
Overview
Individuals travelling to Slovakia with below purpose of
- Study visit, research, or other types of internship
- Medical treatment
- Film crews or Official delegations or Seafarers
- Airport transit
Applicants will have to provide evidence that he/she falls under this category.
visa_types.full_text:
